title: Armor Trim Preview
description: Shows you what a trim item will look like with a special icon.
body:
This pack allows you to see what every armor trim looks like by just hovering over its item!

![Example of Armor Trim Preview.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6x4toyE1/images/436f368773d7a674eef7a9bf4055199bc525c40e.png)
